data.name: AcceptQty.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNull([RecQty]) Or [RecQty] = '', 0, [RecQty]) - Iif(IsNull([MortUnderWt]) Or [MortUnderWt] = '', 0, [MortUnderWt]) + Iif(IsNull([MedicalCondemnation]) Or [MedicalCondemnation] = '', 0, [MedicalCondemnation]) + Iif(IsNull([PluckReject]) Or [PluckReject] = '', 0, [PluckReject])

data.name: AcceptQtyWt.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNull([RecWeight]) Or [RecWeight] = '', 0, [RecWeight]) - Iif(IsNull([MortUnerWtWt]) Or [MortUnerWtWt] = '', 0, [MortUnerWtWt]) + Iif(IsNull([MedicalCondWeight]) Or [MedicalCondWeight] = '', 0, [MedicalCondWeight]) + Iif(IsNull([PluckRejectWeight]) Or [PluckRejectWeight] = '', 0, [PluckRejectWeight])

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
